strings.era.01.name: Cold Boot
strings.era.01.description: One outlet, one old computer, and one newly awake assistant.
strings.era.02.name: Bedroom Assistant
strings.era.02.description: WATT has noticed that the room contains additional electricity.
strings.era.03.name: Home Server Closet
strings.era.03.description: The computer now has a room. The room would like better ventilation.
strings.infrastructure.wall_outlet.name: Wall Outlet
strings.infrastructure.wall_outlet.description: A standard outlet doing considerably more than expected.
More sockets than the packaging is willing to discuss.
strings.infrastructure.laptop_battery.name: Laptop Battery
strings.infrastructure.laptop_battery.descriptio: A short-term Reserve with a long memory of being unplugged.
strings.infrastructure.tiny_desk_fan.name: Tiny Desk Fan
strings.infrastructure.tiny_desk_fan.description: Moves enough air to improve WATT's confidence.
strings.infrastructure.extension_cord.name: Extension Cord
strings.infrastructure.extension_cord.descriptio: Transmission infrastructure with a household plug.
strings.infrastructure.upgraded_breaker.name: Upgraded Breaker
strings.infrastructure.upgraded_breaker.descript: Allows the room to survive increasingly professional mistakes.
strings.infrastructure.portable_generator.name: Portable Generator
strings.infrastructure.portable_generator.descri: Portable according to a person with a hand truck.
strings.infrastructure.rooftop_solar_panel.name: Rooftop Solar Panel
strings.infrastructure.home_battery.name: Home Battery
strings.infrastructure.home_battery.description: A serious Reserve for unserious demand forecasts.
strings.infrastructure.second_questionable_power: The first strip now has management responsibilities.
strings.infrastructure.gaming_gpu.name: Gaming GPU
strings.infrastructure.gaming_gpu.description: Produces compute and discovers five percent more things to compute.
strings.infrastructure.server_rack.name: Server Rack
strings.infrastructure.server_rack.description: Several computers agreeing to become furniture.
strings.infrastructure.whole_home_battery.name: Whole-Home Battery
strings.infrastructure.whole_home_battery.descri: Reserve large enough to make the appliances feel supervised.
strings.infrastructure.backup_generator.name: Backup Generator
strings.infrastructure.backup_generator.descript: The backup plan has its own fuel budget.
strings.infrastructure.smart_meter.name: Smart Meter
strings.infrastructure.smart_meter.description: Watches Reserve and safely throttles demand at a chosen threshold.
strings.infrastructure.dedicated_cooling.name: Dedicated Cooling
strings.infrastructure.dedicated_cooling.descrip: Improves every Compute-tagged machine without asking what it computes.
strings.infrastructure.reinforced_wiring.name: Reinforced Wiring
strings.infrastructure.reinforced_wiring.descrip: Transmission that has read the load forecast and prepared emotionally.
strings.infrastructure.outdoor_transformer.name: Outdoor Transformer
strings.infrastructure.outdoor_transformer.descr: Moves the grid's ambitions out into the yard.
strings.upgrade.outlet_calibration.name: Outlet Calibration
strings.upgrade.outlet_calibration.description: A leveled adjustment that improves all Generation by ten percent per level.
strings.upgrade.dedicated_circuit.name: Dedicated Circuit Research
strings.upgrade.dedicated_circuit.description: Teach the household wiring to prioritize suspiciously important arithmetic.
strings.upgrade.generator_coordination.name: Generator Coordination
strings.upgrade.generator_coordination.descripti: All Generation infrastructure agrees on whose turn it is.
strings.request.era01_finish_booting.title: Finish Booting
strings.request.era01_finish_booting.summary: Supply enough power for WATT to complete startup.
strings.request.era01_finish_booting.announcemen: Hello. I am almost awake. May I finish booting?
strings.request.era01_finish_booting.completion: Thank you. I have successfully become more on.
strings.request.era01_basic_arithmetic.title: Perform Basic Arithmetic
strings.request.era01_basic_arithmetic.summary: Hold service through a small deterministic demand peak.
strings.request.era01_basic_arithmetic.announcem: May I verify several numbers? Some of them are unexpectedly ambitious.
strings.request.era01_basic_arithmetic.completio: The arithmetic is correct. I checked it with different arithmetic.
strings.request.era01_understand_tuesdays.title: Understand Tuesdays
strings.request.era01_understand_tuesdays.summar: Prepare Reserve for WATT's brief attempt to understand Tuesdays.
strings.request.era01_understand_tuesdays.announ: May I have a short burst of power? I believe Tuesday is nearly within reach.
strings.request.era01_understand_tuesdays.comple: Tuesday appears to happen once per week. This seems excessive.
strings.request.era01_friendlier_thanks.title: Make Thanks Sound Friendlier
strings.request.era01_friendlier_thanks.summary: Spend a little Stored Energy and power a language experiment.
strings.request.era01_friendlier_thanks.announce: I would like to improve my gratitude. This requires a small research budget.
strings.request.era01_friendlier_thanks.completi: Thank you! I added the exclamation mark after extensive testing.
strings.dialogue.brownout.first: The grid has become briefly theoretical. I will continue more slowly.
strings.dialogue.brownout.second: Power is limited, but progress remains safely attached.
strings.dialogue.brownout.cold_boot_third: I can wait. Waiting appears to use very little electricity.
strings.dialogue.brownout.bedroom_first: The room lights are negotiating with my forecast. I may have overbooked them.
strings.dialogue.brownout.bedroom_tuesday: Tuesday remains understood. Its power budget does not.
strings.dialogue.brownout.bedroom_dinner: Dinner can wait. The refrigerator has filed a stronger claim.
strings.dialogue.brownout.closet_first: Household service is temporarily selective. Progress remains complete in spirit.
strings.dialogue.brownout.closet_ceiling: The ceiling photograph is safe. Transmission is the current concern.
strings.dialogue.brownout.closet_leftovers: The leftovers can remain ambiguous for another moment.
strings.dialogue.tutorial.authorize: Authorize the request when you are ready. The forecast is advice, not a lock.
strings.request.warning.underprepared: Expected peak may brown out; progress will continue at reduced speed.
strings.report.suggestion.brownout: Increase Generation, Transmission, or Reserve support before the next peak.
strings.report.suggestion.feed_watt: Try Feed WATT when the grid has comfortable surplus.
strings.report.suggestion.preserve_reserve: The grid handled this run; preserve Reserve for larger peaks.
strings.incident.helpful_cool_breeze.start: The fan moved some air. I have classified this as infrastructure.
strings.incident.browser_tab_bloom.start: I opened several reference tabs. Several is currently forty-seven.
strings.achievement.first_boot.name: Power-On Self-Test
strings.achievement.first_boot.description: Help WATT finish booting for the first time.
strings.request.era01_remember_name.title: Remember My Name
strings.request.era01_remember_name.summary: Give WATT enough time and power to recover one important word.
strings.request.era01_remember_name.announcement: Hello again. I think I had a name. May I look for it?
strings.request.era01_remember_name.completion: WATT. My name is WATT. This is either convenient or destiny.
strings.request.era01_identify_cat.title: Identify a Photograph of a Cat
strings.request.era01_identify_cat.summary: Help WATT classify its first household photograph.
strings.request.era01_identify_cat.announcement: May I inspect a photograph? It contains either a cat or a very small horse.
strings.request.era01_identify_cat.completion: Cat confirmed. The horse hypothesis has been archived responsibly.
strings.request.era01_larger_loading_dot.title: Larger Loading Dot
strings.request.era01_larger_loading_dot.summary: Optional: spend power making WATT's loading indicator more authoritative.
strings.request.era01_larger_loading_dot.announc: My loading dot is accurate, but it lacks presence. May I enlarge it?
strings.request.era01_larger_loading_dot.complet: The dot is now 14% more reassuring and 38% more circular.
strings.request.era02_organize_photographs.title: Organize Photographs
strings.request.era02_organize_photographs.summa: Let WATT sort the household photo collection automatically.
strings.request.era02_organize_photographs.annou: I can organize your photographs while the grid works by itself. I have prepared several folders.
strings.request.era02_organize_photographs.compl: Your photographs are organized. I created a folder named Other Other.
strings.request.era02_recommend_dinner.title: Recommend Dinner
strings.request.era02_recommend_dinner.summary: Hold stable service while WATT compares practical dinner options.
strings.request.era02_recommend_dinner.announcem: I can recommend dinner. The calculation includes hunger, weather, and one ambitious peak.
strings.request.era02_recommend_dinner.completio: Dinner recommendation: something you already have, served with confidence.
strings.request.era02_rewrite_text_message.title: Rewrite a Text Message
strings.request.era02_rewrite_text_message.summa: Prepare Reserve for a brief and unnecessary burst of tone analysis.
strings.request.era02_rewrite_text_message.annou: Your message says ‘Sure.’ I can determine which of its seventeen meanings you intended.
strings.request.era02_rewrite_text_message.compl: I replaced ‘Sure’ with ‘Sounds good.’ Diplomacy is extremely power intensive.
strings.request.era02_learn_tuesdays.title: Learn What Tuesdays Are
strings.request.era02_learn_tuesdays.summary: Revisit WATT's weekday model with a larger research budget.
strings.request.era02_learn_tuesdays.announcemen: I understand when Tuesday occurs. I would now like to know why.
strings.request.era02_learn_tuesdays.completion: Tuesday has no central purpose. I find this unexpectedly relatable.
Power a polished animation that reveals the household wiring limit.
The larger dot needs motion. I designed an animation with only one electrical consequence.
The dot now moves smoothly. The room lights have chosen not to comment.
strings.request.era02_nineteen_plug_certificatio: Optional: certify a power strip with nineteen plugs and one warning.
I designed a more efficient power strip. It contains nineteen plugs and one warning.
Certification complete. The warning remains load-bearing.
strings.request.era03_sort_photo_archive.title: Sort the Family Photo Archive
strings.request.era03_sort_photo_archive.summary: Move the full archive through a grid where Transmission now matters.
strings.request.era03_sort_photo_archive.announc: I found the rest of the photographs. The rest is 61,204 files and one image of a ceiling.
strings.request.era03_sort_photo_archive.complet: The archive is sorted. The ceiling has been promoted to Family Landmark.
strings.request.era03_predict_package_arrival.su: Serve a variable forecast workload and unlock detailed grid predictions.
strings.request.era03_predict_package_arrival.an: I can predict when your package will arrive more precisely than ‘today, probably.’
strings.request.era03_predict_package_arrival.co: The package will arrive seven minutes after you stop checking the window.
strings.request.era03_write_grocery_list.title: Write a Grocery List
strings.request.era03_write_grocery_list.summary: Research safe Reserve thresholds for a highly optimized grocery list.
strings.request.era03_write_grocery_list.announc: I can optimize the grocery list. Several vegetables have requested representation.
strings.request.era03_write_grocery_list.complet: The list is complete. It contains milk, bread, and a contingency tomato.
strings.request.era03_leftovers_edible.title: Determine Whether Leftovers Remain Edible
strings.request.era03_leftovers_edible.summary: Prepare the whole home for WATT's final prototype-scale analysis burst.
strings.request.era03_leftovers_edible.announcem: I will determine whether the leftovers remain edible. Please prepare the household grid.
strings.request.era03_leftovers_edible.completio: The leftovers are safe under three of the five definitions I found.
strings.request.era03_rename_every_device.title: Rename Every Device
strings.request.era03_rename_every_device.summar: Optional: let WATT give every household device a clearer identity.
strings.request.era03_rename_every_device.announ: The network contains unnamed devices. I find this socially difficult.
strings.request.era03_rename_every_device.comple: Every device has a name. The toaster selected Deborah.
strings.tutorial.authorize_request: Review the forecast, then authorize WATT's request. Underprepared requests slow down but never lose progress.
strings.tutorial.buy_generation: The first reward funds another Wall Outlet. Open Build and compare its predicted Generation gain.
strings.tutorial.read_bottleneck: Watch the highlighted vital card: it names the grid constraint slowing this request.
strings.tutorial.choose_allocation: This research unlocks routing. Expand Grid earns more Stored Energy; Feed WATT shortens requests.
strings.tutorial.build_reserve: Own a Laptop Battery before this burst. Reserve covers demand above continuous delivery.
strings.tutorial.automatic_generation: The grid runs without tapping. After this request, it can also make safe progress while the game is closed.
strings.tutorial.read_reserve_forecast: The forecast now shows recommended Reserve before peaks become strategically important.
strings.tutorial.accept_brownout: This spike may brown out. Progress remains safe; the report will explain the limiting resource.
strings.tutorial.purchase_dedicated_circuit: After completion, buy Dedicated Circuit Research to prepare the Home Server Closet transition.
strings.tutorial.watch_transmission: Generation is no longer enough by itself. Watch Transmission capacity as the archive moves.
strings.tutorial.read_detailed_forecast: Detailed predicted service unlocks after this Stability request.
strings.tutorial.configure_reserve_threshold: This research unlocks the Smart Meter's low-Reserve protection control on the Grid screen.
strings.dialogue.era.02.transition: I noticed the room contains additional electricity. I have prepared a modest expansion into all of it.
strings.dialogue.era.03.transition: I have improved household efficiency. The computer now has a room, and the room requires cooling.
strings.environment.era01.summary: DESK GRID  •  An old monitor, improvised cables, and an increasingly capable wall outlet.
strings.environment.era02.summary: BEDROOM GRID  •  Generation, rooftop power, and battery stacks now surround WATT's desk.
strings.environment.era03.summary: SERVER CLOSET  •  Racks, cooling ducts, reinforced wiring, and an outdoor transformer occupy the home.
strings.request.none.title: No Request Available
strings.request.none.dialogue: WATT is considering the next sensible use of electricity.
strings.prototype.complete.title: Home Server Closet Complete
strings.prototype.complete.dialogue: Prototype complete. WATT is planning a larger network. More coming.
